title: Implement Type-Safe FSMs
description: Implement type-safe Finite State Machines using TypeScript's Discriminated Unions. Utilize the `never` type to enforce exhaustive checking and prevent invalid state transitions at compile time.
objectives: Implement type-safe Finite State Machines using TypeScript's Discriminated Unions.
Utilize the `never` type to enforce exhaustive checking and prevent invalid state transitions at compile time.
